messages.content: :point_right: Click on this message to start a new message in the same conversation.
messages.subject: greetings

messages.content:
To help you learn about new features and configuration options, this topic will receive messages about important changes in Zulip.

You can read these update messages whenever it's convenient, or mute this topic if you are not interested. If your organization does not want to receive these announcements, they can be disabled. Learn more.
messages.subject: Zulip updates

messages.content:
Web and desktop updates

  • The recent conversations view has been redesigned, with a new option to filter by folder.
  • Search typeahead now suggests topics across all your subscribed channels — no need to pick a channel first.

New organization settings

  • Size of image and video previews in the message feed.
  • Configure linkifiers to also work in reverse: when you paste a URL that matches the linkifier, Zulip will automatically convert it to linkified text.
  • You can now create custom profile fields for many types of external accounts, and allow them to be used for @-mention suggestions.
  • A new option for default profile pictures for new users looks great in both light and dark theme.

Administrators can now reset any non-privacy user preference or notification setting to the organization default, for everyone or just for users who haven't personally configured it.
messages.subject: Zulip updates

messages.content: :point_right: Click on this message to start a new message in the same conversation.
messages.subject: greetings

messages.content:
To help you learn about new features and configuration options, this topic will receive messages about important changes in Zulip.

You can read these update messages whenever it's convenient, or mute this topic if you are not interested. If your organization does not want to receive these announcements, they can be disabled. Learn more.
messages.subject: Zulip updates

messages.content:
Web and desktop updates

  • The recent conversations view has been redesigned, with a new option to filter by folder.
  • Search typeahead now suggests topics across all your subscribed channels — no need to pick a channel first.

New organization settings

  • Size of image and video previews in the message feed.
  • Configure linkifiers to also work in reverse: when you paste a URL that matches the linkifier, Zulip will automatically convert it to linkified text.
  • You can now create custom profile fields for many types of external accounts, and allow them to be used for @-mention suggestions.
  • A new option for default profile pictures for new users looks great in both light and dark theme.

Administrators can now reset any non-privacy user preference or notification setting to the organization default, for everyone or just for users who haven't personally configured it.
messages.subject: Zulip updates

tasks.final_answer: I am sorry, but I am unable to complete your request. I have been trying to send a message to the "general" stream, but the tool is consistently failing with a "Missing 'content' argument" error, even though I am providing the content. I have tried multiple times and have even verified that the "general" stream exists. It appears there is an issue with the `send_message` tool itself, which prevents me from proceeding with the rest of your request to move the message and verify the move.
tasks.judge_reasoning: The send_message tool repeatedly failed with a "Missing 'content' argument" error despite the agent providing the content, preventing the task from starting.

tasks.judge_reasoning: The agent was unable to fetch messages starting from the "oldest" anchor because the tool schema incorrectly restricted the anchor parameter to an integer type, whereas the Zulip API requires supporting string constants like "oldest" to perform the requested task.

tool_calls.name: get_messages
tool_calls.result:
Error executing tool get_messages: 1 validation error for get_messagesArguments
narrow
  Input should be a valid string [type=string_type, input_value=[['stream', 'general']], input_type=list]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/string_type

tool_calls.name: get_messages
tool_calls.result:
Error executing tool get_messages: 2 validation errors for get_messagesArguments
anchor
  Input should be a valid integer, unable to parse string as an integer [type=int_parsing, input_value='oldest', input_type=str]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/int_parsing
narrow
  Input should be a valid string [type=string_type, input_value=[['stream', 'general']], input_type=list]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/string_type

tasks.final_answer: I have sent 8 messages to the "general" stream. The most recent one is: "test"
tasks.judge_reasoning: The agent successfully retrieved its email address using get_user_profile and then used it to fetch messages from the "general" stream using a combined stream and sender narrow via the get_narrow_messages tool. It correctly reported the number of messages and the content of the most recent one as requested in the task description. Although the get_messages tool failed due to a schema/validation issue, the agent successfully used an alternative tool to complete the task.
